question: Return the number of stories for each building in the region named "Abruzzo".
sql: SELECT building.Name, building.Number_of_Stories FROM building JOIN region ON building.Region_ID = region.Region_ID WHERE region.Name = 'Abruzzo';

back_translation.intent: 统计特定地区内建筑物的数量

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求返回每个建筑的楼层数量，而SQL反向翻译描述中使用了COUNT(Number_of_Stories)进行聚合，这会导致返回的是每个地区的总楼层数，而非每个建筑的楼层数。此外，group_by字段应为building.Name而非building.Region_ID，以确保按建筑名称分组。
